proposed_deterministic_rules.low: fixed-time theatre/exhibition or unknown small venue
proposed_deterministic_rules.medium: concert, forum or sport at documented mid-tier venue
proposed_deterministic_rules.high: festival or sport/concert at 5,000+ capacity-proxy venue
proposed_deterministic_rules.very_high: match or major concert at Astana Arena/Barys Arena tier

observed_live_events.reason: venue coordinates unresolved; no attendance or matched-road evidence fabricated
